About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 2012, Shrenik Ltd does Trading and Processing of all kinds of Paper, Pulp, Paper Boards etc.
[1]
Key Points
Business Overview:
[1]
SL is a Paper-Trading Company with its operations in Gujarat, Rajasthan, and Maharashtra. It is a Whole-sale Distributor for Ballarpur Industries Limited, Tamilnadu Newsprint and Papers Limited, Asia Pulp and Paper (Indonesia and China), Shah Pulp and Paper Mills Limited, NR Agarwal Industries Limited, April Fine Paper Trading Pte Ltd (Singapore) and Naini Group.
